type: DONE
my_files: dspy/streaming/streaming_listener.py
note: Finished. Summary of exact changes in dspy/streaming/streaming_listener.py: (1) added 'import time' at top. (2) __init__ signature: added new trailing param 'idle_timeout_s: float | None = None'; body: added 'self.idle_timeout_s = idle_timeout_s' and 'self._last_chunk_ts = None' as the last two lines (right after self.allow_reuse = allow_reuse). (3) receive(): added exactly one new block right after the try/except that extracts chunk_message (before the 'if chunk_message and start_identifier in chunk_message:' line): 'if chunk_message:\n    self._last_chunk_ts = time.time()' - no other lines in receive() touched. (4) Added a brand new method 'tick(self, now_ts: float | None = None) -> StreamResponse | None' appended at the very end of the class, after flush(). It's self-contained (checks idle_timeout_s/stream_start/stream_end/_last_chunk_ts, emits StreamResponse(...,chunk=''), and resets state unconditionally). All clear for you to layer debug logging on top - just avoid the two exact lines I added in receive() and don't modify tick()'s body/the two new __init__ lines. Tests in tests/streaming still pass (15 passed, 3 skipped).
